headline: Dow Jones Hits High, SpaceX Keeps Rising, But AI Stocks Skid; Warsh's Fed Debut On Tap
summary: The Dow Jones hit a new high and SpaceX kept rising. But chips and most AI stocks fell. Fed chief Kevin Warsh's comments will be in focus Wednesday.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Hits High, SpaceX Keeps Rising, But AI Stocks Skid; Warsh's Fed Debut On Tap
raw.summary: The Dow Jones hit a new high and SpaceX kept rising. But chips and most AI stocks fell. Fed chief Kevin Warsh's comments will be in focus Wednesday.

headline: IBD Stock Of The Day: AI Data Center, Power Grid Company Trades In Buy Zone
summary: The nation's largest electrical construction company has seen its backlog swell to a record $48.5 billion as not just data centers but other construction trends sustain growth.

raw.headline: IBD Stock Of The Day: AI Data Center, Power Grid Company Trades In Buy Zone
